name: Playground E2E Fixture
description: A pinned test app used by the playground-app E2E suite. Do not interact manually — automated tests rely on its metadata being stable.
readme:
# Playground E2E Fixture

This app exists solely as a fixture for the playground-app end-to-end test suite. It is published once by `e2e/setup.ts` and re-used across all test runs to provide a deterministic target for browse/detail/rate tests.

**Do not interact with this app manually** — its metadata is asserted on by automated tests.

Owner: the playground-app E2E funder account (set via the `E2E_FUNDER_SEED` GitHub Actions secret).
